description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and a uniform brown finish. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are attached and have a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, minimalist appearance. The legs are short, dark, and barely visible, positioned at the corners for stability. The upholstery appears to be faux leather or vinyl, with a subtle sheen and no visible decorative stitching or tufting. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or public lounges.
description: A modern, boxy brown three-seater sofa with attached cushions and straight armrests, finished in smooth faux leather. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three attached seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's full width.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, wide armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat back panel and the sofa's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniform seat cushions and three attached, uniform back cushions arranged in a linear configuration.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, boxy armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and seat, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, dark, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible and likely made of wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, segmented backrest with three attached cushions, matching the seat cushion arrangement and lacking tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown upholstery with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
